news.headline: Comstock Resources to announce Q1 2025 results on April 30, 2025 after market closes, with conference call on May 1 at 10:00 a.m. CT.
news.summary: On April 30, 2025, Comstock Resources, Inc. (NYSE:CRK) based in Frisco, TX, intends to announce its first quarter 2025 financial results post-market closure. Moreover, the company is scheduled to conduct a quarterly conference call at 10:00 a.m. CT on May 1, 2025, to deliberate on the performance and outcomes of the first quarter.

news.headline: Tejon Ranch Co. reaffirms dedication to shareholder value, showcasing effective execution of long-term strategy.
Volkswagen to impose import fee on US-sold cars due to 25% tariffs by Trump, impacting auto prices.
news.summary: One of the initial and most evident instances of car manufacturers responding to the 25 percent tariffs enforced by President Trump on imported automobiles and auto components is the company’s decision to implement price hikes as a countermeasure.

news.headline: Utz Brands (NYSE: UTZ) to report Q1 2025 results on May 1, 2025. Press release at 6:30am, webcast at 9:30am ET.
news.summary: Utz Brands, Inc. (NYSE: UTZ), a prominent U.S. maker of branded salty snacks and a small-cap value Staples equity, revealed its intention to disclose its first quarter 2025 financial outcomes on Thursday, May 1, 2025. The announcement will include a press release, pre-recorded management comments, and a slide presentation scheduled to be released at 6:30 a.m. EST. Subsequently, a live webcast Q&A session with analysts will take place at 9:30 a.m. EST.

news.headline: Helen of Troy to release Q4 and FY 2025 results on April 24, 2025, with conference call at 9:00 a.m. Eastern.
news.summary: Helen of Troy Limited (NASDAQ: HELE) revealed plans to unveil its Q4 and fiscal year 2025 financial results before the market opens on Thursday, April 24, 2025. The company, known for its branded consumer products, will also host a conference call on the same day at 9:00 a.m. Eastern to review these results. Investors and stakeholders can expect important insights on the company's performance during this call.

news.headline: Dominion Energy to hold Q1 2025 earnings call at 11am on May 1. Live webcast available for stakeholders.
news.summary: Dominion Energy (NYSE: D) will hold its Q1 2025 earnings call on May 1, 2025, at 11 a.m. ET in Richmond, Va. The call will cover financial highlights and other pertinent updates. A live webcast with slides and financial data can be accessed on investors.dominionenergy.com. Those opting for phone participation can dial in for details.

news.headline: DigitalOcean to host Investor Day in New York on April 4, 2025 at 9 a.m. ET. CEO Paddy Srinivasan to present. Details at investors.digitalocean.com.
news.summary: In New York, the Investor Day for DigitalOcean Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DOCN) is set to take place on April 4, 2025. Initially revealed on February 5, 2025, the event will commence with a live webcast at 9 a.m. ET accessible at https://investors.digitalocean.com. The occasion will feature presentations from DigitalOcean's CEO, Paddy Srinivasan, and key members of its leadership. The focus will be on providing insights and updates on the company's performance and future strategies.

news.headline: AXT, Inc. to release Q1 2025 earnings on May 1, 2025, followed by a conference call at 1:30 p.m. PT. Access at (800) 715-9871.
news.summary: A California-based company, AXT, Inc. (NasdaqGS: AXTI), specializing in compound semiconductor substrates, is set to reveal its first-quarter financial outcomes for 2025. This announcement will follow the market's closure on May 1, 2025. Additionally, a conference call is scheduled for May 1, 2025, at 1:30 p.m. PT to delve into these results. To join the call, dial (800) 715-9871 with the passcode 4378083. The call will also be live-streamed at www.axt.com. Replays will be available for review post-event.

news.headline: Simulations Plus (NASDAQ: SLP) reports Q2 fiscal 2025 revenue up 23% to $22.4 million compared to Q2 2024.
news.summary: In Research Triangle Park, N.C., Simulations Plus, Inc. (Nasdaq: SLP) announced its financial results for the second quarter of fiscal 2025, ending on February 28, 2025. The company reported a significant increase in total revenue, which rose by 23% to $22.4 million compared to the same period in 2024. Simulations Plus is a prominent provider of cheminformatics, biosimulation, simulation-enabled performance, intelligence solutions, and medical communications services to the biopharma sector.

news.headline: Trump's tariffs lead to Stellantis laying off 900 workers in Mexico and Canada due to 25% tariff on imported vehicles and auto parts.
news.summary: Numerous large companies have already started announcing layoffs in response to President Donald Trump's new tariff policies. Stellantis N.V. (NYSE: STLA), one of the Big Three automakers, revealed on Thursday that it will temporarily lay off 900 employees and halt production at a plant in both Mexico and Canada. The layoffs were prompted by a 25% tariff on all imported vehicles and auto parts that took effect recently. Additionally, President Trump imposed a 10% tariff on all imports to the US and introduced reciprocal tariffs on multiple countries. This situation has led to significant economic impacts in the automotive industry.

news.headline: Compass Diversified declares $0.25 quarterly cash distribution per common share, payable on April 24, 2025.
news.summary: Compass Diversified (NYSE: CODI) has declared a quarterly cash distribution of $0.25 per share on its common shares, payable on April 24, 2025. The distribution is for the three months ended March 31, 2025, and will be given to all holders of record of Common Shares as of April 17, 2025.

news.headline: Susan Sanderson promoted to Chief Marketing Officer at Sportsman's Warehouse, enhancing leadership in essential growth area.
news.summary: In West Jordan, Utah, on April 03, 2025, a leading outdoor retailer, Sportsman’s Warehouse Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: SPWH), revealed the appointment of Susan Sanderson as the new Chief Marketing Officer. This move aims to fortify the company's top management in a critical area for its growth strategies. The promotion of Susan Sanderson signifies a pivotal step for the company's future plans and underscores its dedication to enhancing its marketing efforts.

news.headline: FLO Living partners with femtech innovators for study on Cycle Syncing® impact on menstrual symptoms. Leading ground-breaking research.
news.summary: Pioneering Research to Address Women's Hormonal Health Discrepancies Unveiled in New York on April 3, 2025. FLO Living spearheads a unique study to investigate the effectiveness of the Cycle Syncing® Method in reducing menstrual cycle symptom burden. The research aims to quantify the total number of symptoms experienced and determine the method's impact on alleviating these symptoms.

news.headline: AMERISAFE in Deridder, LA reveals 2025 Q1 earnings release and conference call schedule announcement.

The company will be releasing the financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on a date to be confirmed. The following day, they will hold a conference call to discuss these earnings, providing insights and analysis. Investors, analysts, and other interested parties are encouraged to join this call to learn more about AMERISAFE's performance in the first quarter. Stay tuned for further details on the specific date and time of the earnings release and conference call.

news.headline: Hasbro will report Q1 2025 earnings on April 24, 2025, in Pawtucket, RI. Stay tuned for financial updates.
news.summary: Toy company Hasbro will release its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on April 24, 2025, in Pawtucket, Rhode Island. This announcement comes amid anticipation for the company's performance, with analysts and investors eager to see the numbers. Keep an eye out for updates on Hasbro's earnings and possible insights into the toy industry's trends.

This event, hosted by the PenFed Foundation, a nonprofit aiding veterans in transitioning to civilian life, will honor their dedication and service.

news.summary: On April 3, 2025, Alexander & Baldwin, Inc. (NYSE: ALEX), a company based in Hawai'i specializing in commercial real estate, will announce its first quarter 2025 results after the market closes on Thursday.

news.headline: EVA Air and Houston Rockets celebrate Filipino Heritage Night with exclusive experiences, commemorative jerseys, and EVA Air prizes.

The collaboration with EVA Air brought a memorable touch to the game, offering fans a chance to engage with the festivities through commemorative jerseys and exciting rewards.

news.headline: AAR Corp. sells Landing Gear Overhaul business to GA Telesis for $51 million in investment.
news.summary: AAR CORP, a prominent aviation services provider for commercial and government operators, MROs, and OEMs, has finalized the sale of its non-core Landing Gear Overhaul business to GA Telesis for $51 million. The transaction was completed on April 3, 2025, based in Wood Dale, Illinois. AAR CORP is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol AIR.

news.headline: Egis appoints Alaa AbuSiam as new CEO of Americas region. Covers North and South America operations.

news.headline: Rigetti Computing to join DARPA’s Quantum Benchmarking Initiative, a major step towards advancing quantum technology.
news.summary: In recent data released, it has been reported that there was a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the past week, with over 10,000 new cases confirmed. Additionally, hospitalizations have also risen by 15%, with 500 new admissions in the same timeframe. Experts are urging the public to follow safety guidelines and get vaccinated to help curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Logan Ridge Finance Corp to release Q1 2025 earnings on May 9, 2025 at 11:00 am ET in conference call.
news.summary: A conference call has been set for 11:00 am ET on Friday, May 9, 2025. This call is scheduled to take place at that specific time.

news.headline: Navios Maritime Partners L.P. reveals Vice Chairman Ted Petrone's retirement. Navios owns dry cargo & tanker vessels.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, Navios Maritime Partners L.P. declared the retirement of Mr. Ted Petrone, who served as the Vice Chairman of the company. Navios Partners, a global entity specializing in dry cargo and tanker vessels, shared this news. Ted Petrone's departure marks a significant change within the company's leadership. Navios Partners is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol NMM.

news.headline: Lifecore Biomedical reports $35.2M in Q3 revenue, signs agreements with new and existing customers, gives corporate update.
news.summary: In the third quarter of fiscal year 2025, the company reported revenues totaling $35.2 million. Additionally, they successfully secured various development agreements with both new and existing clients.

news.headline: Iceland Seafood Intl. completed auction of bills, with offers totaling ISK 1.340 million, accepting ISK 620 million.
news.summary: Iceland Seafood International hf. has successfully completed the issuance of 6-month bills under the new series ICESEA 25 1007. The total offers received for the bills during the auction reached ISK 1.340 million, out of which offers worth ISK 620 million were accepted at an 8.70% simple rate. The bills are set to be listed on Nasdaq Iceland in the forthcoming weeks.

news.headline: Perion Network adopts rights plan to protect shareholder interests, maximize long-term value. Board of Directors adopted this plan intending to reduce the likelihood of any entity gaining control.
news.summary: Perion Network Ltd., a prominent player in modern advertising technology, revealed today in New York and Tel Aviv that its Board of Directors has implemented a limited duration shareholder rights plan (the "Rights Plan"). Traded on NASDAQ and TASE under PERI, the aim of this strategic move is to empower Perion's shareholders to fully capitalize on their investment. This plan serves as a safeguard to minimize the chances of any individual or entity acquiring control.

news.headline: Rebellion Defense expands U.S. Navy contract for target recognition, battlespace awareness. Collaboration under the Tradewinds CDAO.
news.summary: In Washington, Rebellion Defense, a prominent U.S. defense software firm, has revealed an extension of its agreement with the U.S. Navy to advance target recognition and battlespace awareness. The contract was secured through the U.S. Navy Program Executive Office Integrated Warfare Systems (PEO IWS) utilizing Tradewinds CDAO. This move exhibits the Navy's trust in Rebellion's technology, emphasizing their commitment to enhancing defense capabilities.

news.headline: EACO Corp. reports record quarter: Net sales grew by 20.2% to $100,132, net income rose by 23.0% to $6,763.
news.summary: EACO Corporation (OTC Pink: EACO) has released its quarterly results for the period ending February 28, 2025. In comparison to the same period last year (February 29, 2024), there was a notable increase in key financial indicators. Net sales for the three months ended February 28, 2025, were $100,132 thousand, reflecting a 20.2% rise from $83,335 thousand in the previous year. Net income also experienced growth, reaching $6,763 thousand compared to $5,498 thousand, marking a 23.0% increase. Earnings per share data was not provided in the rephrased content.

news.headline: Experts find Trump's tariff formula closely resembles ChatGPT suggestions, fueling suspicion that AI was used to manipulate trade deficit ratio for stock market impact.
news.summary: The White House purportedly utilized an AI system to analyze the trade-deficit ratio and develop a formula to intentionally disrupt stock markets. The information suggests a deliberate manipulation that has raised considerable concerns.

news.headline: Vaxil releases a new management and operations report, impacting operations and staff.
CTO Realty Growth Inc. has partially extinguished $51.0 million ($1,000 principal amount of Notes = 73.8112 shares) in Convertible Senior Notes.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, Winter Park, Florida - CTO Realty Growth, Inc. (NYSE: CTO) revealed that it has engaged in privately negotiated exchange deals with specific holders of its 3.875% Convertible Senior Notes that were set to mature on April 15, 2025. Before these agreements, the Notes totaled $51.0 million in principal value, which equates to about 3.8 million underlying shares considering the current conversion rate of 73.8112 shares of CTO common stock for every $1,000 of principal on the Notes.

news.headline: NeuroOne plans public stock offering to improve surgical care for neurological disorders patients.
news.summary: In Eden Prairie, Minnesota, today on April 3, 2025, NeuroOne Medical Technologies Corporation (Nasdaq: NMTC) revealed plans for a new underwritten registered public offering of its common stock. The company, dedicated to enhancing surgical care for those with neurological disorders, is taking this significant step to potentially raise capital and expand its operations. This move by NeuroOne underscores its commitment to improving patient outcomes and advancing medical technology.

news.headline: Portman Ridge Finance Corp to release Q1 2025 earnings on May 9 at 10:00 am ET in conference call.
news.summary: A call is set to take place at 10:00 am Eastern Time on Friday, May 9, 2025.

news.headline: Sell crypto via MetaMask: Not all tokens are easily tradable. Use platforms to swap or bridge tokens to sell. MetaMask integrates fiat off-ramps for ETH. Non-KYC, P2P options available on platforms like Bisq or LocalCoinSwap. Ensure tokens are added & identified correctly on MetaMask. Swapping and bridging may be needed to sell tokens for cash. Peer-to-peer (P2P) trading and crypto ATMs offer alternative ways to cash out. Taxes apply when selling crypto - check local laws.
news.summary: The article discusses the process of selling crypto tokens held in the MetaMask wallet. It highlights the importance of checking the liquidity and legitimacy of tokens before attempting to sell them, as well as the potential need for swapping and bridging to convert tokens to more liquid assets like ETH or stablecoins. It also outlines different selling options available through MetaMask, centralized exchanges like Coinbase, peer-to-peer platforms, and decentralized P2P platforms like LocalCoinSwap and Bisq. The article also mentions using cryptocurrency ATMs for withdrawing funds from MetaMask and discusses the tax implications of selling crypto tokens. Overall, the article provides a comprehensive guide on how to cash out crypto from a MetaMask wallet while emphasizing the importance of understanding local tax regulations and potential risks involved in the process.

news.headline: Apollomics (Nasdaq: APLM) reports full year 2024 financial results and highlights clinical updates and business progress.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, Apollomics Inc. (Nasdaq: APLM) revealed its fiscal year 2024 financial results. The Foster City-based biopharmaceutical company, known for developing advanced oncology treatments, showcased progress in addressing challenging and resistant cancers. Key details included various oncology drug candidates in late-stage clinical development. Business highlights and clinical updates were also emphasized in the announcement.

news.headline: TFI International (NYSE and TSX: TFII) to release Q1 2025 results on April 23, 2025 after market close. Webcast on April 24 at 9AM ET with CEO Alain Bédard.
news.summary: In Montreal, the transportation and logistics company TFI International Inc. (NYSE and TSX: TFII) will be reporting its financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The results will be shared through a news release on Wednesday, April 23, 2025, after the market closes. A webcast featuring Alain Bédard, the Chairman, President, and Chief Executive Officer, will take place on Thursday, April 24, 2025, at 9:00 AM Eastern Time to discuss these results.

news.headline: AVITA Medical introduces Cohealyx in the U.S., a collagen-based dermal matrix enhancing tissue integration and revascularization.
news.summary: AVITA Medical has introduced Cohealyx™ in the United States, a collagen-based dermal matrix that aims to encourage tissue integration and revascularization. This launch marks a significant milestone for the company as they expand their product offerings in the U.S market. Cohealyx™ is designed to assist in promoting the healing process and has been developed to specifically support tissue integration and revascularization. This launch signifies AVITA Medical's commitment to providing innovative solutions to aid in tissue regeneration.

news.headline: Duolingo (Nasdaq: DUOL) to reveal Q1 2025 results on May 1, 2025, after US market close; video webcast at 5:30 p.m. ET.
news.summary: A Pittsburgh-based company, Duolingo, Inc. (Nasdaq: DUOL), a prominent mobile learning platform globally, is set to disclose its first-quarter outcomes for the period concluding on March 31, 2025. The announcement is scheduled post the U.S. market closure on Thursday, May 1, 2025. Subsequently, at 5:30 p.m. ET on the same day, the company will conduct a video webcast.

news.headline: Credit Acceptance named No. 34 on Fortune's 2025 Best Companies to Work For list, moving up 5 spots from last year.
news.summary: In Southfield, Michigan, on April 03, 2025, Credit Acceptance Corporation (NASDAQ: CACC) has been recognized as one of the 100 Best Companies to Work For® by Great Place To Work® and Fortune magazine. This marks the eleventh time the company has received this honor, achieving a rank of #34, five spots higher than the previous year.

news.headline: Reality TV personality Nick Viall secures a lucrative podcast deal worth tens of millions.
Mulvihill Premium Yield Fund (TSX: MPY) declares $0.06400 per unit distribution for ETF Class, payable on May 7, 2025.

news.summary: On April 3, 2025, in Toronto, NetraMark Holdings Inc. (referred to as "the Company" or "NetraMark") announced its presence in the market through trading under CSE: AIAI, OTCQB: AINMF, and Frankfurt: PF0. NetraMark is a leading player in AI, specifically in the pharmaceutical sector, focusing on revolutionizing clinical trials by leveraging AI to drive precision analytics.

news.headline: Martha Stewart to be Global Storyteller at Vivid Sydney 2025, sharing career insights and personal brand journey.

This exclusive one-time event will delve into Martha's remarkable career and how her personal brand has evolved over the years.

news.headline: Triad Business Bank amends unaudited 2024 results, $1.1 million credit loss allowance included.

news.headline: I-Mab (NASDAQ: IMAB) reports 2024 financials, focused on immuno-oncology for cancer treatment in a business update.
news.summary: In Rockville, Maryland, on April 3, 2025, I-Mab (NASDAQ: IMAB), a prominent U.S.-based biotech firm specializing in precision immuno-oncology treatments for cancer, unveiled their financial performance for the entire year concluding on December 31, 2024.
